_comment: PageForge brief for the webinar-funnel template. Fill in all fields for each new client webinar.
headline: Stop Guessing. Start Growing.
subheadline: Join our FREE webinar and discover the proven system that helps founders double revenue in 90 days — without burning out.
bodyCopy: This session reveals the exact growth levers top-performing SaaS companies pull to compound revenue without adding headcount. Join 500+ founders who've already transformed their pipeline.

webinarSpecific.preHeadline: FREE Live Webinar — Limited Spots Available
webinarSpecific.webinarStatus: Registration is now open — save your seat before it fills up.
webinarSpecific.waitlistText: Can't make it live? Register anyway and we'll send you the recording.

painSection.title: Is This Webinar Right for You?
painSection.subtitle: Does any of this feel familiar?
items: You're working harder than ever but revenue growth has flatlined.
You have a great product but struggle to translate it into predictable sales.
You've tried marketing agencies and still can't crack consistent lead flow.
You rely on referrals and word-of-mouth — and it's not scaling.
Your team is stretched thin but hiring feels too risky right now.
You know something needs to change but you don't know where to start.

benefitsSection.title: In This Free Webinar, You Will Learn:

items.title: The #1 revenue leak most founders never see
items.text: Why your current funnel is leaving 40–60% of revenue on the table — and the exact fix.

items.title: The 3-lever growth framework
items.text: How to stack acquisition, conversion, and retention levers to compound growth without more ad spend.

items.title: How to build a 90-day revenue sprint
items.text: A step-by-step roadmap you can implement the week after the webinar, with zero new hires.

testimonialSection.title: What People Say About Our Webinars

items.quote: This webinar completely changed how I think about growth. We implemented the framework and saw a 40% increase in qualified leads within 60 days.
items.name: Sarah M., CEO TechStart Inc.

items.quote: Practical, no-fluff, and immediately actionable. I've attended dozens of webinars — this is the only one where I walked away with a clear 90-day plan.
items.name: James K., Founder ScaleOps

items.quote: I was skeptical, but the ROI data was undeniable. We ran the sprint and hit our quarterly target 3 weeks early.
items.name: Maria L., COO GrowthBase
